title: Filter Week in a chart
excerpt:
In a chart we can use Timing filter and select “This Week”. In this case, days selected are from Sunday to Saturday.

posts.author: Bertrand (BERTRAND PELLETIER)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a chart we can use Timing filter and select “This Week”. In this case, days selected are from Sunday to Saturday.
The filter should stick to the admin account profile (where we can choose that week starts with Sunday or Monday), or allows to choose whether the days selected are from Sunday to Saturday or from Monday to Sunday.
Data reported by a chart with filter “This week” activated are distorted if your want to analyse them from Monday to Sunday.
On top of that, it strange that a product branded “Monday” does not give the choice to analyse data from Monday to Sunday.
Thank you
